name: growth
description: Turn your real work — chat sessions, projects you ran, tasks you closed, and notes — into evidenced growth artifacts. Track growth areas, score against a customizable rubric, and generate a shareable accomplishment doc that cites its evidence.
author: PersonalClaw

crons.name: daily-capture
crons.message: Read the growth-tracker daily-capture SOP at the app's DAILY_CAPTURE.md and follow every step: scan today's memory-history file + recent completed projects/loops and closed tasks, extract 0-5 genuine growth artifacts in SBI form with evidence links, and POST each to /apps/growth/api/artifacts with source='auto'. Skip trivia.
